chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constitutional Petition No. D-341 of 2021 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge 1. For orders on office objection as flag A. 2. For orders on maintainability of main case. 13.7.2021 Petitioner is present in person. Mr.Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A.G. ---- Lutufullah Buriro, XEN Irrigation Department, Dadu is present and files comments which are taken on record. The petitioner is present in person and states that after filing of this petition his grievances have been redressed, therefore, he does not press this petition further. Accordingly the petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE
